description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent gable roof covered in tan shingles. The exterior walls are primarily off-white, accented by vertical orange columns at the corners and between window sections. The front facade features a wide, flat-roofed porch or overhang supported by two columns, providing a sheltered entryway. Windows are rectangular and symmetrically arranged, with three on the upper front and two on each side. The house has a clean, modern appearance with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing geometric lines and functional design. The structure appears to be constructed from concrete or stucco with reinforced columns, typical of contemporary suburban homes.
description: A modern two-story house with a tan gable roof, off-white walls, and orange vertical accents. Features a wide front porch and symmetrically arranged rectangular windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a wide porch, three upper windows, and orange-accented columns.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the gable roof's slope, two side windows, and the continuation of orange columns.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible entry, featuring orange columns and a plain wall with no windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with two windows and orange columns visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide flat-roofed porch with supporting columns and a recessed main door
